title: Obsidian Update
description: A mod that adds Obsidian Tools like pickaxe/axe/shovel/sword
body: In this mod you no longer need stone/iron/diamonds/netherite becuase you can craft it with WOOD! and have to install the mod jei to see the recipes of the tools! you can also hit mobs with any tool in 1 hit kill and u can mine anything in 1 click!
